threats.title: Insufficient Access Control
threats.description: The system's access control mechanisms are not adequately defined or enforced, potentially allowing users to gain unauthorized access to privileged resources or functionalities.  Without proper role-based access control (RBAC) and least privilege principles, users could escalate their privileges to perform actions they are not authorized to perform.
threats.affected_component: Application Servers, Database Servers, System Configuration
threats.attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the application code, misconfigured access controls, or privilege escalation vulnerabilities.
mitigations: Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to restrict user access to only the resources they need.
Enforce the principle of least privilege, granting users only the minimum necessary permissions.
Regularly review and audit user access rights to ensure they remain appropriate.

threats.title: Weak Authentication Mechanisms
threats.description: The system lacks detailed authentication and authorization information, making it vulnerable to attackers bypassing authentication mechanisms. Without robust multi-factor authentication (MFA) and strong password policies, attackers could potentially impersonate legitimate users and gain unauthorized access to sensitive data and system resources.
threats.attack_vector: Credential stuffing, brute-force attacks, phishing, or exploiting vulnerabilities in the authentication protocol (e.g., weak session management).
mitigations: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Enforce strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation).
Regularly review and update authentication protocols to address known vulnerabilities.

threats.title: Insecure Data Storage
threats.description: Sensitive data is handled without adequate protection against unauthorized modification. This could involve storing data in plain text, using weak encryption algorithms, or failing to properly sanitize user inputs before storing them in the database.  An attacker could modify data in transit or at rest, leading to data corruption or manipulation.
threats.affected_component: Database, Application Servers, Data Transmission Channels
threats.attack_vector: SQL injection, cross-site scripting (XSS), or direct manipulation of database records.
mitigations: Implement robust input validation and sanitization to prevent injection attacks.
Utilize strong encryption algorithms for data at rest and in transit (TLS/SSL).
Regularly audit and monitor database access logs for suspicious activity.

threats.title: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption
threats.description: The system lacks mechanisms to prevent resource exhaustion, potentially leading to denial-of-service attacks. Without rate limiting, input validation, or proper resource management, an attacker could overwhelm the system with requests, causing it to crash or become unresponsive.
threats.affected_component: Application Servers, Database Servers, Network Infrastructure
threats.attack_vector: Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks, resource-intensive requests, or vulnerabilities in the application code.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting to restrict the number of requests from a single source.
Validate user inputs to prevent oversized or malicious data from consuming excessive resources.
Utilize a Content Delivery Network (CDN) to distribute traffic and mitigate DDoS attacks.

threats.title: Lack of Data Classification
threats.description: Without a defined data classification scheme, the system doesn't know what data is sensitive. This leads to inconsistent security controls being applied, increasing the risk of unauthorized disclosure of confidential information.  Data that should be protected is not, and vice versa.
threats.attack_vector: Accidental exposure through misconfigured access controls, insecure APIs, or vulnerabilities in the application code.
mitigations: Implement a data classification scheme based on sensitivity levels.
Apply appropriate security controls based on the classification level (e.g., encryption, access restrictions).
Regularly review and update the data classification scheme to reflect changing business requirements.

gaps: Insufficient Access Control - Lack of granular access reviews
Weak Authentication Mechanisms - Absence of multi-factor authentication for critical systems
priorities: Medium - Data Storage Security & Lack of Data Classification

dfd_mermaid:
flowchart TB

    %% Styling
    classDef external fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#0277bd,stroke-width:2px
    classDef process fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#2e7d32,stroke-width:2px
    classDef datastore fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ef6c00,stroke-width:2px
    classDef threat fill:#ffebee,stroke:#c62828,stroke-width:3px

    subgraph External["External Entities"]
        user[("👤 User")]
        admin[("👔 Admin")]
        external_api[("🌐 External API")]
    end

    subgraph TrustBoundary["Trust Boundary"]
        subgraph Frontend["Frontend Layer"]
            web_app["🖥️ Web Application"]
        end

        subgraph Backend["Backend Layer"]
            api_gateway["🚪 API Gateway"]
            auth_service["🔐 Auth Service"]
            core_api["⚙️ Core API"]
        end

        subgraph Data["Data Layer"]
            database[("💾 Database")]
            cache[("⚡ Cache")]
        end
    end

    %% Data Flows
    user -->|"🔒 HTTPS"| web_app
    admin -->|"🔒 HTTPS + MFA"| web_app
    web_app -->|"🔒 API Calls"| api_gateway
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Auth Check"| auth_service
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Business Logic"| core_api
    auth_service -->|"🔒 User Data"| database
    core_api -->|"🔒 CRUD"| database
    core_api -->|"⚠️ Session"| cache
    core_api -->|"🔒 External Call"| external_api

    %% Apply Styles
    class user,admin,external_api external
    class web_app,api_gateway,auth_service,core_api process
    class database,cache datastore
    class auth_service,database threat

custom_policies.name: check_elevation_of_privilege_1
custom_policies.guideline: Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to restrict user access to only the resources they need.

custom_policies.name: check_spoofing_2
custom_policies.guideline: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.

custom_policies.name: check_tampering_3
custom_policies.guideline: Implement robust input validation and sanitization to prevent injection attacks.

custom_policies.name: check_denial_of_service_4
custom_policies.guideline: Implement rate limiting to restrict the number of requests from a single source.

custom_policies.name: check_information_disclosure_5
custom_policies.guideline: Implement a data classification scheme based on sensitivity levels.

semgrep.config_file:
rules:
- id: security-custom-1
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Insufficient Access Control
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-269
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Elevation of Privilege
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-2
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Weak Authentication Mechanisms
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-287
    owasp: A07:2021
    threat_category: Spoofing
  patterns:
  - pattern: password = "..."
  - pattern: secret = "..."
  - pattern: api_key = "..."
  severity: ERROR
- fix: cursor.execute($QUERY, (params,))
  id: security-custom-3
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Insecure Data Storage
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-89
    owasp: A03:2021
    threat_category: Tampering
  patterns:
  - pattern: cursor.execute($QUERY)
    pattern-not: cursor.execute($QUERY, $PARAMS)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-4
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-400
    owasp: A05:2021
    threat_category: Denial of Service
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-5
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Lack of Data Classification
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-200
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Information Disclosure
  patterns:
  - pattern: print($SENSITIVE)
  - pattern: console.log($SENSITIVE)
  severity: ERROR
